title: Caesar Salad
tagline: Homemade dressing, real anchovies, no compromises.
description: The real Caesar with from-scratch dressing, crispy croutons, and plenty of parmesan. Yes, it has anchovies. No, you won't taste fish.
steps: For dressing: Mash anchovies and garlic into a paste with the side of your knife (or use a mortar and pestle).
Whisk egg yolks, lemon juice, and mustard in a bowl. Add anchovy-garlic paste.
Slowly drizzle in olive oil while whisking constantly until emulsified and creamy.
Stir in grated parmesan. Season with salt and pepper.
Wash and dry romaine thoroughly. Chop into bite-sized pieces.
Toss romaine with dressing (start with half, add more as needed).
Top with croutons and shaved parmesan. Serve immediately.
notes: The anchovies dissolve into the dressing - no fishy chunks, just umami depth.
For food safety, use pasteurized eggs or skip the yolks and add more mustard.
Make croutons: cube bread, toss with olive oil, bake 400°F 10 min.
